document.source_title: IPL 2026 CSK vs SRH: Cummins and Kishan show the way as Sunrisers march into playoffs

claims.claim_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad secured a place in the playoffs after defeating Chennai Super Kings.
claims.evidence_text: Sunrisers’ second win over CSK this season ensured it booked a place in the playoffs.

entities.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Hyderabad, India.
entities.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad bowling coach Varun Aaron hailed Heinrich Klaasen as the fulcrum of the team’s batting unit.

entities.name: Ishan Kishan
entities.description: A cricketer who played for Sunrisers Hyderabad in IPL 2026.
entities.evidence_text: Ishan Kishan headlined the chase with a measured half-century (70, 47b, 7x4, 3x6).

entities.name: Heinrich Klaasen
entities.description: A cricketer who played a key role in the match for Sunrisers Hyderabad.
entities.evidence_text: Klaasen reinforced that claim with a fine knock on a tricky surface to help his side beat Super Kings by five wickets.

entities.name: Pat Cummins
entities.description: The captain of Sunrisers Hyderabad and a key bowler in the match.
entities.evidence_text: The Sunrisers pacers led by skipper Pat Cummins were on the money in taking pace off their deliveries.

events.event: IPL 2026 match between CSK and SRH
events.evidence_text: IPL 2026 match between Chennai Super Kings and Sunrisers Hyderabad at M.A. Chidambaram Stadium, Chepauk, in Chennai on May 18, 2026.

metrics.name: Match Result
metrics.evidence_text: Sunrisers’ second win over CSK this season ensured it booked a place in the playoffs.

metrics.name: Ishan Kishan Score
metrics.evidence_text: Ishan Kishan headlined the chase with a measured half-century (70, 47b, 7x4, 3x6).

metrics.name: Heinrich Klaasen Score
metrics.evidence_text: Klaasen’s 26-ball 47 (6x4, 2x6) that changed the course of the game.
